review_body: Smooth and well-balanced. My daily go-to drink.
Nice flavor but a bit too sweet for my taste. Would order again with less syrup.
Incredibly smooth. No bitterness at all. Love the 24-hour extraction process.
Good size but could use more blueberries. A bit dry compared to other bakeries.
The caramel drizzle makes this drink. Absolutely delicious every time.
Great spice blend. The chai concentrate is clearly high quality.
Best chocolate croissant I have had outside of Paris. Perfectly flaky.
